name: Andromeda Metals Limited
description: Andromeda Metals Limited is an Australian mineral exploration and development company primarily focused on the Great White Kaolin Project in South Australia. The company specializes in the exploration and development of high-grade halloysite-kaolin deposits, which are used in various industrial applications including ceramics, paint, and advanced technologies. Andromeda Metals is committed to becoming a leading global supplier of high-quality kaolin and halloysite products.
